info.name: Regulatory Reporting Platform
info.description: Local collection for JWT authentication, report files and processing jobs. Import with the local environment and run login first to populate tokens.

pm.test('deletes file or reports it already unavailable', () => pm.expect([204, 404, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code));
